title: implement.py automation missing — implement skill is currently manual-fallback-only
description: See implementation-gaps/current.json gap-0003. Author dev-tooling/implementation/implement.py with bd ready --json polling, audit-field formatting for bd close --note, and a hard refusal to close any issue whose gap-id still appears in current.json after a fresh refresh-gaps run.

title: plan.py automation missing — plan skill is currently manual-fallback-only
description: See implementation-gaps/current.json gap-0002. Author dev-tooling/implementation/plan.py with bd noninteractive command repertoire. Surface gaps to user before creation; honour depends_on as bd dep add edges. Re-run check-gap-tracking after each batch.

title: .beads/config.yaml is git-tracked — Open Brain convention is to gitignore it
description: See implementation-gaps/current.json gap-0006. Add .beads/config.yaml to top-level .gitignore + git rm --cached .beads/config.yaml. Subsequent setup-beads runs re-assert required values, so the per-clone file regenerates.

title: Three SKILL.md files are minimal stubs — full operational prose deferred
description: See implementation-gaps/current.json gap-0005. Once gap-0001/2/3 close and Python automation exists, expand each SKILL.md to reference now-existing entry points and remove 'Manual fallback (current state)' sections.
